vo.probability_out_of_range: Probability must be between {min} and {max}, but got {value}.
vo.odds_not_greater_than_one: Odds must be greater than {bound}, but got {value}.
vo.implied_probability_out_of_range: Implied probability must be between {min} and {max}, but got {value}.
vo.edge_out_of_range: Edge must be between {min} and {max}, but got {value}.
vo.stake_out_of_range: Stake must be between {min} and {max}, but got {value}.
vo.stake_exceeds_cap: Stake {rawFraction} exceeds the maximum allowed cap of {maxStakePctCap}.
vo.money_invalid_amount: Monetary amount must be a whole number of minor units, but got {value}.
vo.money_currency_mismatch: Amounts in different currencies cannot be combined.
vo.risk_appetite_out_of_range: Risk appetite must be between {min} and {max}, but got {value}.
vo.risk_appetite_not_integer: Risk appetite must be a whole number, but got {value}.
vo.not_finite_number: The value for {field} must be a finite number.

value.no_value_found: No value bet was found for the selected risk level. A higher risk setting may surface more selections — but higher risk means higher variance, not higher expected value.

rationale.positive_edge_best_bet: Best value: the model's probability exceeds the market's implied probability by the largest risk-adjusted margin.
rationale.positive_edge_alternative: Alternative value: a positive edge over the market that also clears your risk profile.

prediction.market_not_supported: The requested market is not supported.

analyze.research_failed: We could not research that fixture right now. Please try again, or refine the team names (e.g. "Portugal vs Spain").

match.teams_identical: A match cannot have the same team on both sides.
match.fixture_query_empty: Enter a fixture to search, e.g. "Real Madrid vs Barcelona".

auth.email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least {min} characters long.
auth.password_too_weak: Password must include upper- and lower-case letters, a number, and a symbol.
auth.age_not_confirmed: You must confirm you are of legal age to register.
auth.terms_not_accepted: You must accept the Terms & Conditions to register.
auth.registration_failed: Registration could not be completed. Please check your details and try again.
auth.invalid_refresh_token: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.invalid_reset_token: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.

user.self_limit_empty: Provide at least one responsible-gambling limit.
